name: Sapphire Wind Farm
current_developer: SWF1 Operations Holdings Pty Ltd as trustee for SWF1 Hold Trust
notable: 75x Vestas V117-3.6MW. ACT Govt 20yr PPA + CBA 12yr corporate PPA. Located in New England REZ.

timeline.title: Financial close — A$600M
timeline.detail: CWP Renewables reached financial closure for A$600M project

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Site works began near Inverell NSW

timeline.title: Turbine erection begins
timeline.detail: Vestas turbine erection commenced on site

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Sapphire Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW DP&E SSD-6688)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 91.5 m hub height for V117-3.6 MW on Northern NSW Tablelands
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Northern Tablelands NSW near Glen Innes — from 3-year on-site met mast
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP modelling with ERA5 long-term correction; P50 net yield
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~38 km of 330 kV transmission line to TransGrid Uralla substation, Northern NSW.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV connection to TransGrid Uralla. TransGrid reinforced Uralla to accept multiple Northern Tablelands wind projects. Part of the NSW New England REZ connection corridor.
eis_specs.notes: 270 MW (75 x 3.6 MW Vestas V117), Northern Tablelands NSW near Glen Innes. Developer: CWP Energy (now RES). NSW SSD approval 2016. Now operating (2019). Northern NSW Tablelands is consistently among NSW's best wind sites. Part of the New England REZ.
